core_skills: Backend programming languages, Distributed backend services, Distributed systems, Batch data processing, Stream data processing
skill_match_scores: Backend programming languages:1.0, Distributed backend services:0.5, Distributed systems:0.0, Batch data processing:0.0, Stream data processing:0.0
must_have_quals: BS or higher degree in Computer Science, or a related technical discipline, or equivalent experience, Proficient in one or more backend languages, like Java, Go, C/C++, C#, with the ability to pick up new ones quickly, Strong problem solving skills, with relevant experience (3+ years) in designing and implementing distributed backend services
preferred_quals: Proven record of building and operating highly reliable distributed systems at scale, Batch and stream data processing experience is a big plus, Experience with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Influx and/or building and operating monitoring infrastructure, Experience building user interfaces with TypeScript is a plus, Under the hood experience with Apache Lucene, ElasticSearch, OpenSearch and other Search technologies is a plus
core_responsibilities: Design system architecture, own key components to deliver a centralized logging system for Uber, Join on call rotation, driving continuous improvements on system availability, scalability, performance and efficiency, Collaborate with other infrastructure teams, production engineer team and product manager to drive adoption and best practices, and to design and implement high impact, cross-product features
job_summary: Uber is providing a centralized observability data platform that empowers engineers with tools for monitoring and troubleshooting. The role involves designing system architecture for a centralized logging system and collaborating with various teams to drive improvements in system performance and efficiency.
